items.placeName: Origin 1982 - Speakeasy bar in The last old house (1982)

facebook.caption:
Tourists walk past 149 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo every day. They have no idea what's inside.

Origin 1982 is a speakeasy bar hidden inside the last original old house on the strip. 4.9 stars across 597 reviews. That rating doesn't happen by accident.

Craft cocktails, zero tourist-bar energy, and a 1982 house that's somehow still standing. Find it before everyone else does.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: A 1982 house on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Push the door. Inside: Origin 1982, a speakeasy with a 4.9-star rating most tourists never find. This is what locals drink on weekends.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about Origin 1982. A 4.9-star speakeasy inside the last old house on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Walk past this 1982 house or walk in. Origin 1982 speakeasy. 597 reviews. 4.9 stars. Your call.

tiktok.caption: The speakeasy tourists keep missing in Phu Quoc. 4.9 stars. Old house. No sign. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocNightlife #SpeakeasyBar

scenes: Exterior shot: weathered 1982 house facade
Hand pushes open a low-lit wooden door
Bartender pours craft cocktail, slow motion

items.placeName: The Cheeky Traveller English Pub & Bar

facebook.caption: POV: you duck into a side alley off Trần Hưng Đạo and find a proper English pub on a tropical island. Cold pints. Bar stools. 4.8 stars from 879 people who clearly know what they're doing. The Cheeky Traveller is the kind of place you walk past, then double back for. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Down a backstreet on Trần Hưng Đạo, cold beer in hand, English pub energy in full swing. The Cheeky Traveller hits different after a day in the sun. 4.8 stars. 879 reviews. Go find it.

instagram.caption: POV: wrong alley, right pub. The Cheeky Traveller, 4.8★ from 879 people. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Cold pint. Side alley. Phu Quoc. The Cheeky Traveller delivers every time.

facebook.caption: Fresh seafood on the beach for $15-30 a head. At Aloha Beach Bar on 68 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, that's exactly what you get. 4.7 stars across 2,045 reviews. The kind of place that fills up fast for good reason. Cold drinks, sand underfoot, plates that actually deliver. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Plates hitting the table, beer already cold, waves a few meters away. Aloha Beach Bar delivers fresh seafood for $15-30 a person. 4.7 stars. 2,045 people agree.

instagram.caption: $15-30 for fresh seafood on the beach. 4.7★, 2,045 reviews. Aloha Beach Bar is not a skip. Tag your travel buddy.

items.placeName: Rosso Sky Bar & Lounge | Night Club

facebook.caption: Phu Quoc nightlife that doesn't feel like a tourist trap. Rosso Sky Bar & Lounge hits different when you're watching the Duong Dong lights from above with a drink in hand. 4.3 stars, rooftop vibes, actual atmosphere. Not every night needs a beach. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Rooftop. Night sky. Duong Dong below you. Rosso Sky Bar & Lounge is the after-dinner move nobody talks about. 4.3 stars and it shows.

instagram.caption: Phu Quoc nightlife that actually delivers. Rosso Sky Bar, Duong Dong rooftop, 4.3 stars. Tag your travel buddy.

4.9 stars. 218 reviews. At a bar on Bãi Trường.

Fu Bar at Regent Phu Quoc sits right on the beach. Cold drinks, sand underfoot, and a rating that almost never happens for a bar on this island.

218 people didn't lie. This one earns it.

facebook.caption: Some nights in Phu Quoc just hit different. Shisha Bar Phú Quốc on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is one of those spots. Pull up a seat, pick your flavor, watch the street slow down. 4.5 stars from 152 reviews means people keep coming back. No hard sell, no rush. Just good smoke and good vibes on the main strip. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Coals glowing, smoke curling, Đường Trần Hưng Đạo buzzing outside. Shisha Bar Phú Quốc rated 4.5 stars for a reason. This is your slow evening sorted.

facebook.caption: This place fixes a bad travel day. INK 360 Rooftop Bar sits on top of the InterContinental. Cocktails above the South China Sea. 4.5 stars across 515 reviews. The crowd is small. The sky is big. Budget $40-80 per person and go at sunset. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: HAPPY BEAR Live Music Bar & Bistro

facebook.caption:
This place fixes a bad travel day.

Live music, cold drinks, and a crowd that actually wants to be there. HAPPY BEAR Live Music Bar & Bistro on 1 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo pulls a 5.0★ from 168 reviews. That's not luck. That's a bar that gets it right, night after night.

Phu Quoc has no shortage of bars. It has a shortage of this feeling.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Live band kicks in. Drinks are cold. 168 people gave HAPPY BEAR Live Music Bar & Bistro a perfect 5.0★ and you can hear exactly why. 1 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Go tonight.

facebook.caption:
4.4 stars. 86 reviews. And the drinks are still cold.

Mojito Beach Bar on 100C/4 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo delivers exactly what the name promises. Sit down, order up, watch Phu Quoc do its thing.

Not the biggest bar on the strip. Not the loudest. Just consistent ratings and a crowd that keeps coming back.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption:
Beach club dining at Bãi Khem for $15-30 a person. That's it. That's the post.

Istanbul Beach Club Phu Quoc sits right on one of Phu Quoc's cleanest stretches of sand. 4.7 stars across 3,326 reviews means the food actually delivers, not just the view.

Lunch with your feet near the water. Under $30. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
